headline: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

raw.headline: Berkshire's new CEO overhauls portfolio, dumping a slate of stocks
raw.summary: Berkshire Hathaway's equity portfolio got one of its biggest renovations ever during Greg Abel's first three months as the company's CEO.

headline: How The Investment Narrative For United Airlines Holdings (UAL) Is Shifting With Fuel And Demand
summary: United Airlines Holdings sits at the center of a mixed analyst reset, with fair value models now clustering around an unchanged US$129.83 target even as underlying assumptions move around fuel and demand. Some firms are trimming or lifting their targets within a wide range as they weigh higher jet fuel inputs against steady revenue assumptions and confidence in the airline’s capacity and pricing plans. As you read on, you will see how to track these shifting calls and what they might mean for...
